description: Downloads a PDF or CSV of the RFIs List

parameters.name: export_format
parameters.description: File format for the export - 'pdf' or 'csv'.

parameters.name: table_configuration_for_export
parameters.description:
Table configuration for the export that controls which columns are visible and their order in the generated PDF or CSV.

When provided, the export will respect both the column visibility settings a...

schema.description: Table configuration object containing column state information

columnState.description: Array of column configuration objects that determines both visibility and order of columns in the export

field.description: The field name/identifier for the column. The order of fields in the array determines the column order in the export. (20 possible values)

hidden.description: Whether the column should be hidden in the export
